title: astragalus ortholobiformis
intro: Astragalus ortholobiformis, also known as a type of milkvetch or a species of legume, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Astragalus genus. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus ortholobiformis include reduced stress and fatigue, improved immune function, and enhanced cardiovascular health, making it a popular herbal remedy among traditional practitioners. Astragalus ortholobiformis is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or capsule, and its extracts are also used in various herbal preparations, including tonics and supplements.
